2026-05-26TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Saint John Port AuthorityAppointment of Chris D. MacDonald of Rothesay, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Saint John Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Shelley M. Rinehart, whose term has expired.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Saint John Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Chris D. MacDonald of Rothesay, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Saint John Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Shelley M. Rinehart, whose term has expired.
